title: thelesperma pubescens var. caespitosum
intro: Thelesperma pubescens var. caespitosum, also known as caespitose greenthread, is a perennial herb in the sunflower family native to the Great Plains of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as promoting wound healing and soothing digestive issues. Caespitose greenthread can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
